summary: Iteration 143: Tested 3 bug fixes - All 3 bugs VERIFIED working. Bug 1: Daily Summary→Expenses redirect now includes branch parameter. Bug 2: Export with date filtering works (backend confirmed). Bug 3: Supplier Report has Custom Range option with date inputs.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug 1 VERIFIED: DailySummaryPage.jsx line 194 - Total Expenses card onClick navigates to /expenses?date={selectedDate}&branch={selectedBranch} when branch is selected
Bug 2 VERIFIED: ExportButtons.jsx passes startDate/endDate to POST /api/export/data. Backend exports.py lines 29-34 filters data by date range and includes dates in filename
Bug 3 VERIFIED: SupplierReportPage.jsx has 'Custom Range' option in period dropdown (line 111). When selected, shows two date inputs (custom-start-date and custom-end-date)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 143: 3 user-reported bug fixes tested and verified. Bug 1: Daily Summary expenses card redirect now includes &branch=BRANCH_ID when a branch is selected (URL: /expenses?date=YYYY-MM-DD&branch=UUID). Bug 2: Export buttons on Expenses page pass startDate/endDate to backend which filters data correctly (smaller file size with date filter). Bug 3: Supplier Report page has 'Custom Range' as 5th option in period dropdown, shows two date input fields when selected.

bug_1_daily_summary_expenses_redirect_wi.test_method: Playwright - selected 'Test Branch' from branch dropdown, then clicked Total Expenses card

bug_2_export_with_date_filtering.test_method: Backend pytest - POST /api/export/data with start_date and end_date parameters
bug_2_export_with_date_filtering.result: Both PDF and Excel exports work with date filtering. Filtered exports return smaller file sizes.

bug_3_supplier_report_custom_date_range.test_method: Playwright - opened period dropdown on Supplier Report page, selected 'Custom Range'
bug_3_supplier_report_custom_date_range.result: Custom Range option exists in dropdown. When selected, two date input fields appear (custom-start-date and custom-end-date). Data filters correctly when dates entered.
bug_3_supplier_report_custom_date_range.code_reference: SupplierReportPage.jsx lines 102-121: Custom Range SelectItem + conditional date inputs

frontend_playwright: Branch selector dropdown exists with multiple branches - PASS
URL contains branch= parameter - PASS (BUG 1 VERIFIED)
Period dropdown shows 5 options including 'Custom Range' - PASS (BUG 3 VERIFIED)
Custom date inputs appear when Custom Range selected - PASS
Date filter buttons visible (All, Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Custom Range) - PASS
Export PDF/Excel buttons visible - PASS (BUG 2 UI VERIFIED)
